zh.lifeSummary: 當Amy Turlogh O'Brien於1491年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 克里時，她的父親King Turlogh O'Brian41歲，母親Ellen Fitzgerald42歲。她於1507年之前與James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1537年在她的家鄉享年46歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 梅奧特洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amy Turlogh O'Brien于1491年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 克里时，她的父亲King Turlogh O'Brian41岁，母亲Ellen Fitzgerald42岁。她于1507年之前与James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1537年在她的家乡享年46岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 梅奧特洛。

nameMeanings.name: O'Brien
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Dermot, Liam, Brigid, Declan, Donovan, John Patrick, Kieran, Colm, Donal, Brennan, Caitlin.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Briain ‘descendant of Brian’, a personal name probably based on the element bre- ‘hill’, with the transferred sense ‘eminence’, i.e. ‘exalted one’. See also Bryan . In Ireland there has also been some confusion with O'Byrne (see Byrne ).
History: This name is borne in particular by one of the greatest of Irish septs, descendants of Brian Boru, who rose to the high kingship of Ireland in 1002.

Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Briain ‘son of Brian’. See O'Brien and Bryan .

nameMeanings.name: Amy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Old French Amee ‘beloved’. This originated in part as a vernacular nickname, in part as a form of Latin Amata. The latter is ostensibly the feminine form of the past participle of amare ‘to love’, but in fact it may have had a different, pre-Roman, origin; it was borne in classical mythology by the wife of King Latinus , whose daughter Lavinia married Aeneas and (according to the story in the Aeneid) became the mother of the Roman people.

variants.name: Aimie
meanings: Anglicized form of Old French Amee ‘beloved’. This originated in part as a vernacular nickname, in part as a form of Latin Amata. The latter is ostensibly the feminine form of the past participle of amare ‘to love’, but in fact it may have had a different, pre-Roman, origin; it was borne in classical mythology by the wife of King Latinus , whose daughter Lavinia married Aeneas and (according to the story in the Aeneid) became the mother of the Roman people.

variants.name: Aimée
meanings: originally a vernacular nickname meaning ‘beloved’, from the past participle of French aimer ‘to love’ (Latin amare; compare Amy ). It has been in use in French since the Middle Ages, although it has never been very common. It is now also used, with or without the accent, as a given name in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Amie
meanings: Variant spelling of   Amy  , corresponding in form to the French vocabulary word meaning ‘(female) friend’.

variants.name: Ami
meanings: Anglicized form of Old French Amee ‘beloved’. This originated in part as a vernacular nickname, in part as a form of Latin Amata. The latter is ostensibly the feminine form of the past participle of amare ‘to love’, but in fact it may have had a different, pre-Roman, origin; it was borne in classical mythology by the wife of King Latinus , whose daughter Lavinia married Aeneas and (according to the story in the Aeneid) became the mother of the Roman people.

en.lifeSummary: When Amy Turlogh O'Brien was born in 1491, in County Kerry, Ireland, her father, King Turlogh O'Brian, was 41 and her mother, Ellen Fitzgerald, was 42. She married James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond before 1507, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1537, in her hometown, at the age of 46, and was buried in Turlough, County Mayo, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amy Turlogh O'Brien est née en 1491, à County Kerry, Irlande, son père, King Turlogh O'Brian, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Ellen Fitzgerald, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond avant 1507, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1537, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Turlough, County Mayo, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amy Turlogh O'Brien 1491 in County Kerry, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater King Turlogh O'Brian 41 und ihre Mutter Ellen Fitzgerald 42. Sie hat vor 1507 in Irland James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1537 im Alter von 46 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Turlough, County Mayo, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amy Turlogh O'Brien è nata il nel 1491 nel County Kerry, Irlanda, sua padre, King Turlogh O'Brian, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Ellen Fitzgerald, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond prima del 1507, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1537, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Turlough, County Mayo, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Amy Turlogh O'Brienが1491年にアイルランドコウントイ ケリーで生まれた時，父King Turlogh O'Brianは41歳，母Ellen Fitzgeraldは42歳であった。1507年以前にアイルランドでJames FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1537年に故郷で46歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ メイオトゥルロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Amy Turlogh O'Brien(이)가 1491년 아일랜드 카운티 케리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 King Turlogh O'Brian(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen Fitzgerald(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1507년 이전 아일랜드에서 James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1537년 그녀의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 메이요 터를루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amy Turlogh O'Brien nasceu em 1491, em County Kerry, Irlanda, seu pai, King Turlogh O'Brian, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Fitzgerald, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond antes 1507, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1537, em sua cidade natal, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Turlough, County Mayo, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amy Turlogh O'Brien родилась в 1491 г. в местности коунти кирри, Ирландия, её отцу по имени King Turlogh O'Brian было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Ellen Fitzgerald, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond перед 1507 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1537 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности турлоую, коунти меио, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Amy Turlogh O'Brien nació en 1491, en County Kerry, Irlanda, su papá, King Turlogh O'Brian, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Ellen Fitzgerald, tenía 42 años. Se casó con James FitzMaurice Fitzgerald 10th Earl of Desmond antes de 1507, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1537, en su pueblo, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Turlough, County Mayo, Irlanda.
